items.summary: Update the backend placeOrder function in backend/main.mo to ensure it always returns a successful order ID and never traps or returns an error variant. The function should reliably store the order (items, total, payment method, timestamp) in the in-memory Map and return the generated order ID on every invocation.

Update the usePlaceOrder mutation in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts and the CheckoutSection component so that clicking 'Place Order' always completes successfully regardless of payment method (COD or GPay). If the backend call fails or returns an error, the frontend must still navigate to the OrderConfirmationPage with a valid order ID. Ensure no error state or failure path can block order confirmation.
